title: taraxacum aeneum
intro: Taraxacum aeneum, also known as the golden dandelion or silver dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum aeneum include its ability to support liver health, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural diuretic. Taraxacum aeneum can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a popular choice for herbalists and natural health practitioners.
